# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-app-ingress
spec:
  tls: # TLS configuration for the ingress resource (optional)  
    - hosts:
        - dev.*mycompanydomain.com
      secretName: development-tls
  rules:
    - host: "dev.*mycompanydomain.com"
      http:
        paths:
          - pathType: ImplementationSpecific # Paths can be defined more explicitly here or in a separate yaml file (optional)  
            path: "/path/to/*app*" 
              backend:
                serviceName: my-service   
                servicePort: 80
